item.title: Quarterly Earnings Review: March 2026 Results Show Marked Improvement Across Market Caps
item.description: The March 2026 quarter earnings season has delivered a marked improvement in corporate profitability, with 63.0% of the 166 stocks declaring results reporting positive outcomes. This represents a significant uptick compared to the preceding three quarters, signalling a broad-based recovery across market capitalisation segments and sectors. Time: Apr 26 2026 09:00 PM IST

item.title: Are Sampann Utpadan India Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Sampann Utpadan India Ltd's latest results show revenue growth of 19.67% year-on-year, but a significant net profit decline of 77.98%, raising concerns about profitability and high leverage. Investors should be cautious and monitor the company's ability to improve margins and manage debt effectively. Time: Apr 26 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Are IDFC First Bank Ltd. latest results good or bad?
item.description: IDFC First Bank's latest results show mixed performance: while net profit declined 36.53% sequentially to ₹318.94 crores, it increased 4.89% year-on-year. The bank's net interest income grew significantly, but challenges with elevated provisions and a declining CASA ratio raise concerns about future profitability sustainability. Time: Apr 26 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Are Essen Speciality Films Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Essen Speciality Films Ltd's latest results are concerning, with a 22.45% decline in net sales and a net loss of ₹8.80 crores for the quarter ending March 2026, indicating significant operational challenges and a need for immediate management intervention. Time: Apr 26 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Are MIC Electronics Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: MIC Electronics Ltd's latest results show a 13.24% year-on-year revenue growth but a significant net loss of ₹18.35 crores due to an extraordinary tax charge, alongside a 43.71% sequential revenue decline, raising concerns about financial stability and cash flow management. Investors should closely monitor the company's response to these challenges. Time: Apr 26 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Are India Cements Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: India Cements Ltd's Q4 FY26 results show a significant net profit increase of 305.59% year-on-year, with improved operating margins, but challenges remain due to low return on equity and negative long-term growth in operating profits. Overall, while recent performance is positive, investors should be cautious about the company's ongoing structural issues. Time: Apr 26 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Are RBL Bank Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: RBL Bank Ltd's latest results show a significant recovery, with a net profit of ₹229.71 crores, up 234.37% year-on-year, and improved asset quality metrics, although net interest margins have compressed. Overall, the bank is in recovery mode, supported by increased institutional holdings, despite ongoing challenges. Time: Apr 26 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Are Axis Bank Ltd. latest results good or bad?
item.description: Axis Bank Ltd.'s latest results show a slight decline in net profit to ₹7,071 crores, impacted by increased provisioning and margin compression, despite strong net interest income and improved asset quality. Overall, the performance is mixed, with challenges in profitability but solid core operations and a strong capital adequacy ratio. Time: Apr 26 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Are Automotive Stampings & Assemblies Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Automotive Stampings & Assemblies Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results show strong operational performance with a net profit of ₹13.28 crores and a 35.88% revenue increase year-on-year, but high debt levels pose ongoing financial challenges. Overall, the results are positive, though concerns about leverage remain. Time: Apr 26 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Quarterly Earnings Review: March 2026 Results Show Marked Improvement Across Market Caps
item.description: The March 2026 quarterly earnings season has brought a marked improvement in corporate profitability, with 63.0% of the 166 companies declaring results reporting positive outcomes. This represents a significant uptick compared to the previous three quarters, signalling a broad-based recovery led by mid and small cap stocks, while large caps continue to show a more cautious performance. Time: Apr 26 2026 06:00 PM IST
